data.body: REBASED stack (10 commits) onto origin/main which had advanced 21 commits — clean rebase, no conflicts, my changes preserved (pyproject 'Three deps', external-integration jq comment, etc). Post-rebase: CLI-ref still current, quickstart passes. FIXED: docs-index gate flagged cli-reference.md as unindexed (e866 created it but 9d81's index predates it) -> added cli-reference.md to docs/README.md User section, amended e866. e866 committed pos10 (held-out TDD 10/10, parity+drift gates green, both CI files). Next: fix 235a plan (section 4v3 residual), implement 235a, then b5a4.
